# Fieldcast

> Fieldcast is a mobile event internet service based in Colorado. We deploy enterprise-grade WiFi to outdoor events, festivals, parks, and remote locations using a solar-powered Ford Transit van with Starlink satellite uplink. We go live in under an hour with no infrastructure required.

## What We Do

Fieldcast provides on-demand broadband connectivity for outdoor events where cellular is overloaded or nonexistent. Our setup includes 800 watts of roof-mounted solar, a 10 kWh lithium battery bank, Starlink satellite uplink (up to 220 Mbps), and enterprise mesh WiFi covering up to 500 meters. We support up to 350+ concurrent devices and multiple isolated network segments (VLANs) with custom branded SSIDs, QoS traffic prioritization, and a live monitoring dashboard.

## Who We Serve

- Outdoor festivals and fairs
- Corporate and private events
- Film production and livestreaming
- Trail races, triathlons, and athletic events
- Emergency and incident response
- Weddings and private gatherings at remote venues

## Service Areas

- [Denver, CO](https://fieldcast-tau.vercel.app/denver) — City Park, Civic Center Park, Washington Park, Denver Botanic Gardens, Chatfield State Park
- [Colorado Springs, CO](https://fieldcast-tau.vercel.app/colorado-springs) — Garden of the Gods, Memorial Park, Palmer Park, Cheyenne Mountain State Park
- [Boulder, CO](https://fieldcast-tau.vercel.app/boulder) — Chautauqua Park, Pearl Street Mall, Boulder Creek Festival, Boulder Reservoir, CU Boulder
- [Fort Collins, CO](https://fieldcast-tau.vercel.app/fort-collins) — Old Town Square, Horsetooth Reservoir, City Park, CSU Campus, Poudre Canyon
- [Castle Rock, CO](https://fieldcast-tau.vercel.app/castle-rock) — Philip S. Miller Park, Castle Rock Amphitheater, Douglas County Fairgrounds
- [Pueblo, CO](https://fieldcast-tau.vercel.app/pueblo) — Colorado State Fairgrounds, Historic Arkansas Riverwalk, Pueblo Reservoir

## Pricing

- **Basecamp** (up to 4 hours, 100 devices): starts at $650
- **Full Day** (up to 10 hours, 250 devices): starts at $1,100
- **Production** (multi-day / large-scale): custom quote
